case_title: SAN FRANCISCO FEDERAL CREDIT UNION VS. TERRI MATHIS et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF GARY L. FERTIG RE; COMPLIANCE WITH CCP 1033 FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO FEDERAL CREDIT UNION
DECLARATION OF GARY L. FERTIG IN SUPPORT OF PLAINTIFF'S APPLICATION FOR DEFAULT JUDGMENT BY CLERK FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO FEDERAL CREDIT UNION

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO FEDERAL CREDIT UNION AS TO DEFENDANT MATHIS, TERRI L. DOES 1 THRU 10, INCL. SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-09-2011
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $282.50 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT MATHIS, TERRI L.

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT & COMPLT; AND CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO FEDERAL CREDIT UNION SERVED NOV-17-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MATHIS, TERRI L.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO FEDERAL CREDIT UNION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MATHIS, TERRI L. $8,814.07 PRINCIPAL, $1,225.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $325.35 INTEREST, $282.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,646.92, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO FEDERAL CREDIT UNION
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $11,044.29 AS TO DEFENDANT MATHIS, TERRI L.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 THRU 10, INCL.
ORIGINAL VISA APPLICATION AND DISCLOSURE AGREEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO FEDERAL CREDIT UNION
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT MATHIS, TERRI L.
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO FEDERAL CREDIT UNION AS TO DEFENDANT MATHIS, TERRI L.
